name: unmarshal_skips_state_validation
code:
proof fn phi_1_unmarshal_skips_state_validation(obj: DynamicObjectView)
    requires
        obj.kind == PodView::kind(),
        PodView::unmarshal_spec(obj.spec) is Ok,
        PodView::unmarshal_status(obj.status) is Ok,
    ensures
        PodView::unmarshal(obj) is Ok,
{
}
reason: unmarshal succeeds when kind/spec/status parse but never checks state_validation — pods with spec == None can be unmarshalled despite failing state_validation

proof fn phi_2_label_selector_none_matches_everything(labels: Map<StringView, StringView>)
    requires
        true,
    ensures
        (LabelSelectorView { match_labels: None }).matches(labels),
{
}
reason: a LabelSelectorView with match_labels == None matches every label set including empty — this means a selector with no constraints selects all pods which may be unintended

name: label_selector_empty_map_matches_everything
code:
proof fn phi_3_label_selector_empty_map_matches_everything(labels: Map<StringView, StringView>)
    requires
        true,
    ensures
        (LabelSelectorView { match_labels: Some(Map::empty()) }).matches(labels),
{
}
reason: a selector with an empty match_labels map vacuously matches all label sets — the forall over an empty domain is trivially true, making Some(empty) and None equivalent

name: object_ref_ignores_uid
code:
proof fn phi_4_object_ref_ignores_uid(p1: PodView, p2: PodView)
    requires
        p1.metadata.name == p2.metadata.name,
        p1.metadata.namespace == p2.metadata.namespace,
        p1.metadata.uid != p2.metadata.uid,
        p1.metadata.name is Some,
        p1.metadata.namespace is Some,
    ensures
        p1.object_ref() == p2.object_ref(),
{
}
reason: object_ref is (kind, name, namespace) ignoring uid — two distinct resource incarnations with different uids produce identical ObjectRefs conflating identity across delete-recreate cycles

name: create_key_namespace_diverges
code:
proof fn phi_5_create_key_namespace_diverges(req: CreateRequest)
    requires
        req.obj.metadata.namespace is Some,
        req.namespace != req.obj.metadata.namespace->0,
    ensures
        req.key().namespace != req.obj.metadata.namespace->0,
{
}
reason: CreateRequest::key uses self.namespace not self.obj.metadata.namespace — these can diverge so the key does not faithfully represent the object's actual namespace
